description: Deposition transcript with Q&A structure, page/line numbers in left margin, and exhibit markers. Known weakness document — left-margin line numbers are known to confuse all extractors.
source: Obtain from any court reporter sample or public deposition via PACER. Alternatively use any publicly-available legal transcription training sample.
knownWeaknessNote: Left-margin page/line numbers (the '1 2 3 4 5' column) are a known failure mode for all extractors including LexVaultMD. Included specifically to measure this failure mode — do not exclude even when LexVaultMD loses.

metadata.note: Update pageCount to match your obtained PDF before running benchmark.

legalArtifacts.manualEvalNote: Verify: (1) page/line numbers from left margin do NOT appear inline with Q&A text, (2) Exhibit markers (Exhibit 1, Exhibit A) are preserved.

clauseContinuity.manualEvalNote: N/A for deposition — Q&A should NOT be joined across pages. Score 5 if Q/A pairs are never split mid-sentence.
